errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Try again in {retry_after}s.
errors.conflict: Data conflict: a record with these values already exists
errors.reset_token_invalid: The password reset link is invalid or has already been used
errors.reset_token_expired: The password reset link has expired
errors.product_not_available: This product isn't available for order
errors.insufficient_stock: Not enough stock for this product
errors.category_self_parent: A category cannot be its own parent
errors.discount_category_required: Select a category for a category-scoped discount
errors.discount_product_required: Select a product for a product-scoped discount
errors.import_unsupported_format: Unsupported import file format. Use CSV or XLSX.
validation.password_min_length: Password must be at least {min_length} characters long
validation.password_requires_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.password_requires_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.password_requires_digit: Password must contain at least one digit
validation.password_requires_special: Password must contain at least one special character
success.password_reset_requested: If an account with that email exists, password reset instructions have been sent
swagger.api_description: REST API for the plumbing & hardware store platform — used by the React Admin Panel, the Telegram Bot, and the Telegram Mini App.
swagger.tag.auth: Admin authentication: login, token refresh, logout, password management
swagger.tag.customer-auth: Customer authentication — used by the storefront, Telegram Bot, and Mini App
swagger.auth.login: Log in with username/email and password, returns an access/refresh token pair
swagger.auth.refresh: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access/refresh token pair
swagger.auth.logout: Revoke a refresh token, ending that session
swagger.auth.me: Get the currently authenticated admin user
swagger.auth.update_language: Update the current admin user's language preference
swagger.auth.change_password: Change the current admin user's password (revokes all other sessions)
swagger.auth.password_reset_request: Request a password reset token (always returns 204, no user enumeration)
swagger.auth.password_reset_confirm: Confirm a password reset with the one-time token, sets a new password
swagger.customer_auth.register: Register a new customer with email + password
swagger.customer_auth.login_phone: Log in with phone + password (architecture-ready; disabled by default)
swagger.customer_auth.telegram: Log in (or auto-register) via Telegram Bot/Mini App initData
swagger.customer_auth.refresh: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access/refresh token pair
swagger.customer_auth.logout: Revoke a refresh token, ending that session
swagger.customer_auth.me: Get the currently authenticated customer's profile (Mini App / Bot / storefront)
swagger.customer_auth.update_language: Update the current customer's language preference (Mini App / Bot / storefront)
swagger.customer_auth.update_profile: Update the current customer's first/last name and phone
swagger.settings.public: Public store info (no auth) — used by the storefront, Bot, and Mini App
swagger.storefront.banners: Active banners — for the Mini App storefront
swagger.storefront.categories_tree: Category tree (active only) — for the Mini App storefront
swagger.storefront.manufacturers: Active manufacturers — for the Mini App storefront
swagger.storefront.collections: Active collections — for the Mini App storefront
swagger.storefront.product_types: Active product types — for the Mini App storefront
swagger.storefront.product_labels: Active product labels — for the Mini App storefront
swagger.storefront.products: Active products with filters — for the Mini App storefront
swagger.storefront.products_filters: Price range and facets (manufacturer/collection/category) among active products
swagger.storefront.product_detail: Get one active product by ID — for the Mini App storefront
swagger.storefront.product_full_detail: Full product detail in one call: images, documents, videos, specs, labels, related products
swagger.storefront.cart_get: Get (or create) the current customer's active cart
swagger.storefront.cart_add_item: Add a product to the cart (or increase quantity), snapshotting the current price
swagger.storefront.cart_remove_item: Remove an item from the cart
swagger.storefront.checkout: Place an order from the current cart (cash payment, no online payments)
swagger.storefront.order_detail: Get one of the current customer's orders by ID
swagger.i18n.messages: Get the full translation catalog for a locale (used by Bot / Mini App / Admin Panel)
swagger.filters.lang: Locale code: ru, en, or uz
swagger.products.filters: Get available filters (price, manufacturers, collections, categories)
swagger.products.apply_scheduled_prices: Apply any scheduled future prices whose activation date has passed
swagger.products.bulk_status: Bulk-change status for a set of products
swagger.products.bulk_manufacturer: Bulk-change manufacturer for a set of products
swagger.products.bulk_category: Bulk-change category for a set of products
swagger.products.bulk_collection: Bulk-change collection for a set of products
swagger.products.bulk_update: Bulk-update arbitrary fields for a set of products
swagger.products.bulk_delete: Bulk soft-delete a set of products
swagger.products.bulk_price_adjust: Bulk price adjustment (percentage or fixed amount)
swagger.products.clone: Duplicate a product (with images, attributes, documents, and videos)
swagger.products.price_rollback: Roll a product's price back to a price history entry
swagger.products.import_preview: Preview a product import from a file (dry run, nothing written)
pydantic_error.bool_type: Value must be true or false
pydantic_error.string_too_short: Must be at least {min_length} characters long
pydantic_error.string_too_long: Must be at most {max_length} characters long
pydantic_error.greater_than_equal: Must be greater than or equal to {ge}
pydantic_error.less_than_equal: Must be less than or equal to {le}
pydantic_error.uuid_parsing: Value must be a valid UUID
pydantic_error.uuid_type: Value must be a valid UUID
pydantic_error.decimal_parsing: Value must be a valid decimal number
pydantic_error.date_parsing: Value must be a valid date
pydantic_error.date_type: Value must be a valid date
pydantic_error.datetime_parsing: Value must be a valid date and time
pydantic_error.datetime_type: Value must be a valid date and time
pydantic_error.string_pattern_mismatch: Value does not match the required format
pydantic_error.bool_parsing: Value must be true or false
swagger.admin_users.sessions_list: List an admin user's active sessions
errors.session_not_found: Session not found or already ended.
swagger.dashboard.analytics: Analytics: views, favorites, cart adds, popular categories and collections
swagger.tag.dashboard: Aggregated statistics for the admin panel dashboard.
